Next page Metal Plates for Solid Repairs 1 Kitchen cabinets 2 Tables 3 Chairs Are these plates suitable for home repairs? Yes, they are ideal for home projects like fixing kitchen cabinets, tables, chairs, and shelves. What sizes do these mending plates come in? They are available in 4-inch, 3-inch, and 2-inch sizes for different repair needs. Are they easy to install? Yes, they are straightforward to install with pre-drilled holes and added screws, making repairs quick and simple. Can I use them for shelves that carry weight? Yes, mending plates can reinforce shelves to prevent sagging under weight. Do they help fix wobbly furniture? Yes, they are an effective solution for stabilizing and securing wobbly tables, chairs, and cabinets.
